mapper.select: SELECT sma.hospital_id, sma.supplier_id FROM scm_supplier_menu_auth sma INNER JOIN scm_hospital_menu_auth hma ON hma.hospital_id = sma.hospital_id AND hma.menu_id = sma.menu_id INNER JOIN scm_hospital_supplier hs ON hs.hospital_id = sma.hospital_id AND hs.supplier_id = sma.supplier_id AND hs.bind_status = '1' WHERE sma.menu_id = #{menuId} AND sma.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}

SELECT #{hospitalId} AS hospital_id, hs.supplier_id FROM scm_hospital_supplier hs INNER JOIN scm_supplier_menu_auth sma ON sma.supplier_id = hs.supplier_id AND sma.menu_id = #{menuId} AND sma.hospital_id IS NULL INNER JOIN scm_hospital_menu_auth hma ON hma.hospital_id = hs.hospital_id AND hma.menu_id = sma.menu_id WHERE hs.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND hs.bind_status = '1'

SELECT sma.hospital_id, sma.supplier_id FROM scm_supplier_menu_auth sma INNER JOIN scm_hospital_menu_auth hma ON hma.hospital_id = sma.hospital_id AND hma.menu_id = sma.menu_id INNER JOIN scm_hospital_supplier hs ON hs.hospital_id = sma.hospital_id AND hs.supplier_id = sma.supplier_id AND hs.bind_status = '1' WHERE sma.menu_id = #{menuId} AND sma.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND sma.hospital_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT hs.hospital_id, hs.supplier_id FROM scm_hospital_supplier hs INNER JOIN scm_supplier_menu_auth sma ON sma.supplier_id = hs.supplier_id AND sma.menu_id = #{menuId} AND sma.hospital_id IS NULL INNER JOIN scm_hospital_menu_auth hma ON hma.hospital_id = hs.hospital_id AND hma.menu_id = sma.menu_id WHERE hs.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND hs.bind_status = '1'
